\tzpentry{ID4394}{Meta Hamiltonian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4394 introduces Meta Hamiltonian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \Hhat_{\mathrm{meta}} = \sum_{k=1}^{N} \sum_{p \in \mathcal{P}} \Hhat_{p}^{\mathrm{helix}}[k] + \Hhat_{\mathrm{inter}}, \end{equation}
